message.content:
{
  "analysis": "The current manual fallback process (PID 3476) failed: full model accuracy was 0.5692 at 252MB, and quantization at cutoff=200000 dropped accuracy to 0.5629. It is still trying more quantization cutoffs, but they are unlikely to reach the required 0.62. No valid /app/model.bin exists; only the stale /app/model_full_manual2.bin remains. We need to stop this process, clean stale files, and launch a stronger manual fastText training run with dim=200, wordNgrams=2, epoch=50, lr=0.5, bucket=400000, minCount=2, loss=softmax on /app/train.ft.txt. The script will save /app/model.bin only if size is less than 150MB and test accuracy is at least 0.62, otherwise launch quantization in a separate subprocess to avoid the observed segfault and try cutoffs until one meets constraints.",
  "plan": "Step 1: kill PID 3476 and remove stale large model files. Step 2: create /app/run_strong.py to train the stronger model, evaluate on /app/test.ft.txt, save /app/model.bin if it passes, else write/run /app/run_strong_quantize.py in a fresh subprocess with multiple cutoffs. Step 3: launch it in the background with unbuffered logging to /app/strong.log. Step 4: show initial log output and job status.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "kill 3476 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; if [ -d /proc/3476 ]; then kill -9 3476 2>/dev/null; fi; rm -f /app/model_full_manual2.bin /app/model_qtmp_manual2.bin /app/model_strong_full.bin /app/model_strong_qtmp.bin /app/model.bin; echo 'cleaned stale models'; ls -lh /app/model*.bin 2>&1
",
      "duration": 2.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/run_strong.py <<'PY'
import os, time, subprocess, sys
import fasttext

TRAIN_FT='/app/train.ft.txt'
TEST_FT='/app/test.ft.txt'
MODEL_PATH='/app/model.bin'
FULL_PATH='/app/model_strong_full.bin'

def evaluate(m, path):
    n,p,r=m.test(path)
    print(f'{path}: n={n} precision@1={p:.4f} recall@1={r:.4f}', flush=True)
    return p

print(f'train file={TRAIN_FT} size={os.path.getsize(TRAIN_FT)/1024/1024:.1f}MB', flush=True)
print(f'test file={TEST_FT} size={os.path.getsize(TEST_FT)/1024/1024:.1f}MB', flush=True)
print('Training strong model...', flush=True)
t0=time.time()
model=fasttext.train_supervised(
    input=TRAIN_FT,
    epoch=50,
    lr=0.5,
    wordNgrams=2,
    dim=200,
    minCount=2,
    bucket=400000,
    ws=5,
    loss='softmax',
    thread=os.cpu_count() or 4,
    verbose=2
)
print(f'train seconds={round(time.time()-t0,1)}', flush=True)

test_acc=evaluate(model, TEST_FT)
model.save_model(FULL_PATH)
full_size=os.path.getsize(FULL_PATH)/1024/1024
print(f'full size MB={full_size:.2f} test={test_acc:.4f}', flush=True)

saved=False
if full_size < 150 and test_acc >= 0.62:
    os.replace(FULL_PATH, MODEL_PATH)
    saved=True
    print(f'SELECTED full model: size MB={os.path.getsize(MODEL_PATH)/1024/1024:.2f} test={test_acc:.4f}', flush=True)
else:
    print('Full model did not meet constraints; launching separate quantize subprocess', flush=True)
    qscript = r'''import os, fasttext
FULL_PATH="/app/model_strong_full.bin"
MODEL_PATH="/app/model.bin"
QTMP="/app/model_strong_qtmp.bin"
TRAIN_FT="/app/train.ft.txt"
TEST_FT="/app/test.ft.txt"

def evaluate(m, path):
    n,p,r=m.test(path)
    print(f'{path}: n={n} precision@1={p:.4f} recall@1={r:.4f}', flush=True)
    return p

for cutoff in [300000, 250000, 200000, 150000, 100000, 75000, 50000, 30000]:
    print(f'Quantizing cutoff={cutoff}...', flush=True)
    qm=fasttext.load_model(FULL_PATH)
    try:
        qm.quantize(input=TRAIN_FT, qnorm=True, retrain=True, cutoff=cutoff, epoch=8, lr=0.3)
    except Exception as e:
        print('quantize failed', repr(e), flush=True)
        continue
    qt=evaluate(qm, TEST_FT)
    qm.save_model(QTMP)
    qs=os.path.getsize(QTMP)/1024/1024
    print(f'quantized cutoff={cutoff} size MB={qs:.2f} test={qt:.4f}', flush=True)
    if qs < 150 and qt >= 0.62:
        os.replace(QTMP, MODEL_PATH)
        print(f'SELECTED quantized model: cutoff={cutoff} size MB={os.path.getsize(MODEL_PATH)/1024/1024:.2f} test={qt:.4f}', flush=True)
        break
    if os.path.exists(QTMP):
        os.remove(QTMP)

if not os.path.exists(MODEL_PATH):
    os.replace(FULL_PATH, MODEL_PATH)
    print('WARNING saved fallback full model', flush=True)
if os.path.exists(FULL_PATH):
    os.remove(FULL_PATH)
if os.path.exists(QTMP):
    os.remove(QTMP)
'''
    with open('/app/run_strong_quantize.py','w') as f:
        f.write(qscript)
    ret=subprocess.run([sys.executable, '-u', '/app/run_strong_quantize.py'])
    print('quantize subprocess return', ret.returncode, flush=True)
    if os.path.exists(MODEL_PATH):
        saved=True

if saved and os.path.exists(MODEL_PATH):
    print('Verifying final model...', flush=True)
    final=fasttext.load_model(MODEL_PATH)
    ft=evaluate(final, TEST_FT)
    fs=os.path.getsize(MODEL_PATH)/1024/1024
    print(f'FINAL model={MODEL_PATH} size MB={fs:.2f} test acc={ft:.4f}', flush=True)
    print('OK' if fs < 150 and ft >= 0.62 else 'NOTOK', flush=True)
else:
    print('ERROR: no final model saved', flush=True)

if os.path.exists(FULL_PATH):
    os.remove(FULL_PATH)
PY
nohup python3 -u /app/run_strong.py > /app/strong.log 2>&1 &
echo "started strong pid $!"
",
      "duration": 1.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "sleep 5; echo '--- log ---'; tail -40 /app/strong.log; echo '--- files ---'; ls -lh /app/model*.bin 2>&1; echo '--- jobs ---'; jobs
",
      "duration": 6.0
    }
  ]
}
